description.en: CART gave decision trees a durable statistical form: recursively split data, measure impurity, grow a tree, and prune it back to control overfitting. The method made models interpretable as if-then paths while still handling nonlinear interactions. It became a foundation for random forests, gradient boosting, and modern tree ensembles.
description.zh: CART 为决策树提供了持久的统计形式：递归划分数据、度量不纯度、生成树，再通过剪枝控制过拟合。该方法让模型可以解释为 if-then 路径，同时能处理非线性交互。它成为随机森林、梯度提升和现代树集成方法的基础。

html.en: Decision rules were attractive because they were interpretable, but they needed a disciplined statistical procedure. CART supplied that procedure for both categorical and numeric outcomes.
html.zh: 决策规则很有吸引力，因为它们可解释，但它们需要有纪律的统计过程。CART 为分类与数值输出都提供了这样的过程。

html.en: CART grows a tree by choosing splits that make child nodes more homogeneous. It then prunes the tree so the final model balances fit and simplicity.
html.zh: CART 通过选择让子节点更同质的划分来生成树，再进行剪枝，使最终模型平衡拟合度与简洁性。

html.en: Experts generally treat CART as a foundational interpretable model and the basic unit behind stronger tree ensembles. Its long-term legacy is the split-and-prune logic used in explanation, tabular modeling, random forests, and gradient boosting.
html.zh: 专家通常把 CART 视为基础性的可解释模型，也是更强树集成方法背后的基本单元。它的长期影响在于划分与剪枝逻辑被用于解释、表格建模、随机森林和梯度提升。

text.en: The tree repeatedly splits the feature space into simpler regions where predictions become easier.
text.zh: 树反复把特征空间划分为更简单的区域，使预测变得更容易。

text.en: Measures such as Gini impurity guide which split best separates classes or reduces prediction error.
text.zh: Gini 不纯度等指标指导哪个划分最能分开类别或降低预测误差。

text.en: A large tree is cut back to reduce overfitting and improve performance on unseen data.
text.zh: 先生成的大树会被裁剪，以减少过拟合并提升未见数据表现。

description.en: Publisher book record for the CART monograph.
description.zh: 出版社图书记录：CART 专著。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not copy publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复制出版方图形。
